welcome.title: Welcome to TrumpetStar!
welcome.description: Your personal trumpet learning platform. Let's give you a quick overview of all the features.

levels.title: Video Lessons
levels.description: Structured courses from beginner to advanced. Learn at your own pace with professional video tutorials.

pdfs.title: Sheet Music & PDFs
pdfs.description: Access an extensive collection of sheet music, practice books, and teaching materials to play along with.

musicxml.title: Interactive Scores
musicxml.description: Play back scores interactively, change the tempo, and practice difficult passages with focus.

practice.title: Practice Journal
practice.description: Document your progress, set goals, and keep track of your practice sessions.

recordings.title: Recordings
recordings.description: Record yourself, listen back to your playing, and track your development over time.

chats.title: Teacher Feedback
chats.description: Share your recordings with your teacher and receive personal video feedback.

classroom.title: Live Classroom
classroom.description: Join live sessions or create your own virtual practice rooms.

socialProof.quote: Developed by music educators – for everyone who wants to learn trumpet.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.a1: Yes! You can start with the free plan and access the first lessons and all tools. Premium plans are available for full access.
faq.q2: Do I need the Trumpetstar books?
faq.a2: The app is perfectly aligned with the Trumpetstar books, but also works independently with the included video lessons and tools.
faq.q3: What age is the app suitable for?
faq.a3: For everyone! Children from age 6 learn playfully, adults benefit from structured lessons and professional tools.
faq.q4: Can I use the app on an iPad?
faq.a4: Yes, the app runs on all devices with a modern browser – smartphone, tablet and desktop.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: Can I cancel at any time?
faq.a1: Yes, you can cancel your subscription at any time. For annual plans, your access continues until the end of the paid period.
faq.a2: Absolutely! You can upgrade at any time. When switching to a higher plan, the remaining period is prorated.
faq.a3: Yes, within the first 14 days you can cancel your subscription without giving a reason and receive a full refund.

hero.title:
No Sound from Your Trumpet?
Here's How to Fix It
hero.subtitle: Don't panic! It's almost always small, easily correctable mistakes. This checklist helps in minutes.
hero.goodNews: 95% of "no sound" problems are embouchure-related – not the instrument. We can fix this in 10 minutes.

cta.title: Stuck and can't move forward?
cta.desc: Via video call we can correct your embouchure directly – often in just a few minutes.
